title: Saturn Font
description: Replaces Minecraft's font with something much worse
body:
# Saturn-Font The _cursed_ font from Earthbound, now localized entirely within your Minecraft! Uses TTF fonts, which means 1.14+ is supported.
taken from [this font package](https://earthboundcentral.com/2009/11/ultimate-earthbound-font-pack/), under CC-BY-SA.
